content.p: For fiscal year 1990 and hereafter funds appropriated under this heading shall be available for acquisition of land for facilities.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Funds appropriated under this heading, referred to in text, refers to funds appropriated under the headings “National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration” and “operations, research, and facilities” of title I, “Department of Commerce”, of the Departments of Commerce, Justice, and State, the Judiciary, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1990, Pub. L. 101–162.
